ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric for which the method is used */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_methods_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection frequency */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric for which the frequency is used */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection frequency */,
  "interval" INTEGER /* Interval of the data collection frequency (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_frequencies_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the observation was collected */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric for the observation */,
  "observed_value" REAL /* Observed value for the meteorological metric */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value for the meteorological metric */,
  "known_mean" REAL /* Known mean value for the meteorological metric */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance of the meteorological metric */,
  "observed_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was made */,
  "observed_time" TEXT /* Time when the observation was made */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method used */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection frequency used */,
  "quality_control_status" TEXT /* Status of quality control (e.g., 'passed', 'failed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the data file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., leader, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report configuration */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the configuration belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric for the report */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency for the report */,
  "time_range" INTEGER /* Time range for the report (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_configs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_configs_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES data_collection_frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_configs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
